title: Discovery of the Elements of Harmony
Grogar's Defeat
description: The earliest known ruler of the land that would eventually become Equestria, Grogar was a mysterious tyrant emperor and creator of all monsters that roam Equus. Eventually, his tyranny was challenged by Gusty the Great and her unicorn warriors, who are theorized to have been an expedition from the north of Equestria. Gusty the Great was able to defeat Grogar after separating him from the source of his power: the Bewitching Bell. Grogar was thus banished to the Realm of Shadows, and his bell hidden by Gusty in the hopes that nobody could use it's evil power again

title: Discovery of the Elements of Harmony
Passing of the Sun & Moon
description: Celestia and Luna take over the responsibility of moving the sun and moon from Star Swirl the Bearded and the other unicorns. In the process, they both gain their cutie marks and true legitimacy as the rulers of Equestria.

title: Planting of the Tree of Harmony
Sealing of the Pony of Shadows
Construction of the Castle of Two Sisters
Night Everlasting
description: Nightmare Moon's 4 year long night.

title: Births of the Mane Six
description:
Fluttershy - 977 CYP (2302 CE)

Rarity - 978 (2303 CE)

Applejack - 979 (2304 CE)

Twilight Sparkle - 980 (2305 CE)

Rainbow Dash - 980 (2305 CE)

Pinkie Pie - 981 (2306 CE)

title: Return of Nightmare Moon
description: Nightmare Moon – an evil being created by Princess Luna hosting the metamagical Tantabus parasite – returns from her 1000 year long banishment on Equus’ moon. Nightmare Moon and the Tantabus were neutralized by Twilight Sparkle and her friends using the rediscovered Elements of Harmony.

title: Canterlot Invasion of 1002
description: Queen Chrysalis kidnaps and disguises herself as Princess Cadence on the eve of Cadence's wedding in an attempt to conquer Canterlot and Equestria in a single decisive strike. Once revealed, her army of changelings wreaks havoc on the city before ultimately being defeated and expelled by the Cadence, her fiancé - Shining Armor, and the bearers of the Elements of Harmony.

title: Storm Wars
description: WIP - Storm King's invasions

title: Return of the Pillars of Harmony
Creation of the Equestrian Space Agency
Project Spyglass
description: WIP - Equestrian FTL program

title: First Contact Between Equus and Humanity
The Great War
description: AKA 1st Hydian War

title: Formation of the Sector Alliance
description: With the outbreak of war between United Equus, the Sarden Clans, and the United Systems Confederace against the Apleen and Huachavi alliance, the Equestrians, Sarden, and Humans formalize their alliance. Princess Twilight Sparkle of Equestria, Peng Wei, the speaker of the Confederate Congress, and the Greenspeaker of Mari would meet aboard the *USS Enterprise* in the a centrally located system at the time simply known as F471, which would later become known as Terminus. Through this meeting of delegates the Sector Alliance was born, a common front against the Apleen and Huachavi.

title: Equus declares war on the Apleen and Huachavi
description: Following the devastating attack on Yildun Rest, the Convocation of Creatures on Equus voted unanimously to enter a state of war with the Apleen and Huachavi government, and approved the emergency reorganization of the Convocation into a legally-binding, planetwide government: United Equus.

title: Creation of Equus High Command
description: With the return of the survivors of the Battle of Yildun Rest back to Equus and the reorganization of the Conclave of Creatures into United Equus, a proper military command structure is formed. Prism Gleam and Nebula Bolt, both fresh veterans of Yildun Rest, senior officers on the ESAV Starswirl's maiden voyage, and long-time members of the Equestrian military, were made into the first two ranking Admirals. Prism Gleam, having served as the head of security in the Yildun Rest colony, was appointed as the commander-in-chief of the Equus Military Forces; while Nebula Bolt was assigned to overseeing the rapid build-up of Equus' military.=

title: Launch of the Cloudsdale-A
description: The first Cloudsdale II-class Cruiser, a design created from the earlier Cloudsdale-class colony ships in response to the outbreak of the great war, is launched from Equus Drydock. The Cloudsdale-A, named in honor of the colony ship destroyed in the first battle of Yildun Rest, was the first of what would become the mainstay of the Equestrian Navy for the most of the great war.

title: The Hauxipec Accords
description: The Hauxipec Accords was a meeting between the Continuation Forces and the Huachavi-Apleen Alliance that marked the final end of the Great War. The Huachavi was forced to give up all claims in the Disuputed Zone, while the remnant of the Apleen Fleet was to surrender immediately to the Apleen Republic or face complete destruction. Following the accords, the Preservers and Sarden both successfully rejoined the Sector Alliance, and the Human and Equestrian members of the Continuation Forces surrendered to their respective governments.

title: Dawn of the Hydian Peace
description: With reconstruction from the Great War complete, the powers of the Hydian Sector entered a prolonged period of peace and prosperity known as the Hydian Peace.

title: Start of the Olympus Ring
description: Construction began on the Olympus Ring, a massive orbital ring around Equus that would serve as a shipyard, star port, and orbital habitat for the planet. It would later prove to be a money pit, frequently behind schedule and above budget.

title: Puerto Paraíso Scandal
description: The Puerto Paraíso Scandal was first uncovered on August 16th, 2653, and would lead to the impeachment and imprisonment of President Gucharo Picorroca in October, and the resignation of Picorroca's entire cabinet, his successor, and 57 Convocation members in November. In the scandal's aftermath, Princess Celestia was appointed interim president on December 7th, 2653.

title: Equus Presidential Election of 2658
description: After serving the remainder of President Picorroca's term, President Celestia ran for reelection, winning a landslide 68.9% of the vote, beginning her 17th term in office.

title: Assassination of Princess Cadence
description: On the way back from a Sector Alliance diplomatic conference on Caren Prime, Princess Cadence, serving as the chief diplomat for Equus, was ambushed in deep space, in the vicinity of the Maw of Tartarus. The official investigation would place blame on the Huachavi, but the real perpetrators were a group of Chrysalid Changeling terrorists.

title: Equestrian Secession from the Sector Alliance
description: In the wake of Princess Cadence's assassination, Equus attempted to bring the Sector Alliance into a war with the Huachavi, who they believed was responsible for the attack. The other members of the alliance refused, which prompted the exit of the Union of Equus from the Sector Alliance.

title: Manehattan Race Riots
description: With a precipitous rise in xenophobia amongst Equestrians, tensions in Equus' most diverse city, Manehattan rose dramatically, reaching a head in the late winter of 2670. Sparked from a court ruling a Huachavi innocent of a crime levied against him, Equestrians took to the streets in a frenzy, starting a brutal, weeks long riot that left thousands dead, mostly non-Equestrian aliens.

title: Emergency Powers Act
description: Following the outset of the Manehattan Race Riots, the Convocation declared a state of emergency, granting President Celestia unilateral emergency powers and suspending the planned 2670 presidential election until further notice. Even after the end of the Manehattan Riots, the state of emergency persisted, and would not be removed until the Convocation disbanded itself in 2671.

title: Formation of the Solar Empire
description: Following the Battle of Nekmer, President Celestia declares herself to be the "Eternal Empress of Equus and it's Colonies". The government of United Equus dissolves itself and hands power over to Celestia.

title: The Marauder War
description: The Marauder War was an invasion and subsequent space conflict fought between the nascent Solar Empire and multiple Sarden clans that had long been raiding into Equestrian space. Pirate strongholds, including the planet Janset III, were captured or destroyed early in the war, with the following decade largely being composed of low level irregular combat against individuals or small groups of marauders.

title: Battle of Nekmer
description: On the 242nd anniversary of the 1st Battle of Yildun Rest and the start of the Great War, Equestrian naval forces engaged a hostile force above the colony of Nekmer, and were able to win the day. Equestrian officials stated that it was a group of Huachavi warships, though most analysts believe the Battle of Nekmer was a false flag attack orchestrated by President Celestia and the Equestrian Navy.

title: Imperial Tribunals on Drakan
description: WIP - Celestia uses the losses during the Drak'vorr occupation as reasoning to have the least loyal members of the military command investigated

title: Fall of the Solar Empire
description: Although at it's peak the Solar Empire controlled practically all of the Hydian Sector, in it's final years it began to face serious internal threats. However, forces such as Luna's Rebellion were never able to strike a killing blow to the Empire, such a thing would come during the cataclysmic Battle of Equus. In the days before the battle, the ESS Eclipse was rediscovered, and in it, the Tantabus. The Tantabus quickly spurred to action, activating what would be called the Nightmare Fleet, and attacked Equus. Through highly destructive means, the Tantabus forced the deposition of Empress Celestia, then disappeared just as quickly as he was found.

title: Foundation of the Union of Free Systems
1st Crewed Landing on Mars
description: Humankind takes its first steps on an alien planet in the Ares II mission.

title: World War 3
description: The final of Earth's three world wars, it was charactarized by a brief period of conventional warfare, and ending in a nuclear exchange that wiped out nearly a quarter of all human life.

title: Lagos Accords
description: Nation-states of Earth agree to complete nuclear disarmarment and the establishment of a second United Nations.

title: Human discovery of Exousite
description: Discovered deep within the moon Io, Exousite would quickly become the most valuable substance known to humanity up to this point. It was first used as a highly effective way of energy storage, but was soon discovered to have non-relativistic properties.

title: Human Invention of FTL Travel
description: Humanity's first working version of a spool drive sent an unmanned probe five million kilometers in 16 seconds, at 0.01% faster than the speed of light. Following this triumph, a manned craft was created: the Relativity. The Relativity took four crew members from Earth to the Jupiter in just under 35 minutes, and a new age dawned for Humanity.

title: Formation of the United Earth Government
description: The second United Nations, having been gradually reformed into a more centralized entitiy over the course of the second half of the 21st century, was officially reorganized into the sole world government on Earth. It would prove to be the framework that future iterations of human civilization would build off of.

title: Early Human Interstellar Expansion
description: During this period, most of the major systems of Humanity were settled: Epsilon Indi, Tau Ceti, Ran, Procyon, and Keid. Other, smaller outposts sprung up across the stars, such as in Sirius and Wolf 359.

title: First Contact Between Humans and Saventi
First Contact Between Apleen and Humans
Ran Belter Riots
description: Disgruntled by predatory trade practices by the core-worlds and an underpreforming economy in the periphery, riots errupted across the Ran asteroid belt, hightening tension between periphery systems such as Ran, Procyon, and Keid, and the inner worlds of humanity.

title: Insurgency in the Periphery
description:
In response to the harsh reaction to the Ran Belt Riots, many citizens of the Human periphery took up arms against Earth and the other core worlds. The insurgency primarily targeted trade lanes, especially ships and traders affiliated with the core worlds; with a few, more brazen, attacks on military targets.

Little tangible success was achieved by the insurgents, but as the central government stepped up military action and authority in the periphery to combat them, more and more regular people in the periphery were pushed towards sympathy for the insurgents and their cause. Due to the widespread nature of the insurgency, the governments of the periphery systems were allowed to arm themselves in order to more effectively combat the insurgents.

title: Dalton City Massacre
description: The central government of the United Systems launches a raid on a suspected insurgent base in Dalton City, Coriter (the primate planet of the Procyon System), against the advice of the planetary government, who had doubts as to the actual presence of insurgents. The actions of the military during the raid enraged the local population, who formed a crowd around the soldiers. It is unknown if a soldier or a member of the crowd shot first, but when the smoke settled 27 citizens of the periphery lay dead in the streets, and the finger was pointed at the core worlds.

title: The Fomalhaut Declaration
description: A joint resolution by the remaining members of the governments of the periphery and the core world. The Fomalhaut Declaration formally ended the United Systems Civil War that had brought humanity to the brink of extinction.

title: First Contact Between Equus and the Sarden
